span.p:
VM died or .ready
went stale while idle

no heartbeat 120s,
but NONE ever arrived
(never picked up)

span.p:
Warm pool: idle VM,
guest refreshes .ready
every second

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Drainer atomically claims task
(one resident root drainer per worker)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage EXACTLY the selected
executor's credential + task-meta
(local/ tasks get none)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Deliver context, then prompt.md LAST
→ DISPATCH in audit log

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Guest validates:
credential set matches executor?
capsule extracts cleanly?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Executor CLI runs unsandboxed
(all actions auto-approved) as its
non-root executor user — containment
is the host: no route, no DNS, no
GitHub; squid allowlist for egress,
direct bridge HTTP for local/ inference

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pool fault, not task fault:
requeue ONCE on the fresh VM
the recycle produces

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bounded no-follow archival:
prompt, exit-code, report ≤10 MiB,
log + patch ≤50 MiB, usage ≤64 KiB,
progress, messages, Q&A

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Volumes wiped on next VM start
→ fresh warm guest boots
